results.rendered_html:
ardhika a. (kī f.) [ardhamarhati ṭhan]
1 Measuring a half; tadardhika  Ms. 3. 1. 
2 Entitled to half a share;
(pb)  Y. 2. 296. 
— kaḥ A half-caste man; vaiśyakanyāsamutpanno brāhmaṇena tu saṃskṛtaḥ . ardhikaḥsa tu vijñeyo bhojyo viprairna saṃśayaḥ  Parāśara .
